RESULT DATA_SUB Conclusion = Centrality-based measures (Betweenness, PageRank) generalize the CD Index by capturing indirect citation flows over expanding k-hop neighborhoods. While the CD Index relies on local node-type counts and exhibits discontinuities near D=0, betweenness and pagerank provide continuous, path-sensitive metrics that better discern indirect influence and align with broader network science paradigms, as theorized in the paper.
